languages.text: "У госпожи Ювенны срочное поручение. Я заменю вас на посту".

traits.locale_text: "У госпожи Ювенны срочное поручение. Я заменю вас на посту".

languages.text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."
languages.original_text: "У госпожи Ювенны срочное поручение. Я заменю вас на посту".

traits.locale_text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."
"Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."
"Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."

languages.text: “尤文娜女士有紧急任务。我来接替你们。”
languages.original_text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."

traits.locale_text: “尤文娜女士有紧急任务。我来接替你们。”

languages.text: « Dame Juvenna a une mission urgente à vous confier. Je suis {mf|venu|venue} vous relever. »
languages.original_text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."

traits.locale_text: « Dame Juvenna a une mission urgente à vous confier. Je suis {mf|venu|venue} vous relever. »

languages.text: "Leydi Juvenna'nın acil bir görevi var. Seni vazifenden azletmeye geldim."
languages.original_text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."

traits.locale_text: "Leydi Juvenna'nın acil bir görevi var. Seni vazifenden azletmeye geldim."

languages.text: «Lady Juvenna tiene un encargo urgente. He venido a relevarlo».
languages.original_text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."

traits.locale_text: «Lady Juvenna tiene un encargo urgente. He venido a relevarlo».

languages.text: "Lady Juvenna hat einen dringenden Auftrag. Ich bin hier, um Euch abzulösen."
languages.original_text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."

traits.locale_text: "Lady Juvenna hat einen dringenden Auftrag. Ich bin hier, um Euch abzulösen."

languages.text: 「ジュベナ女史に急ぎの依頼が。あなたを代わって」
languages.original_text: "Lady Juvenna has an urgent commission. I'm here to relieve you."

traits.locale_text: 「ジュベナ女史に急ぎの依頼が。あなたを代わって」
